## Verses (10)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | The earth is the Lord's, with all its wealth; the world and all the people living in it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | For by him it was based on the seas, and made strong on the deep rivers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Who may go up into the hill of the Lord? and who may come into his holy place? | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | He who has clean hands and a true heart; whose desire has not gone out to foolish things, who has not taken a false oath. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | He will have blessing from the Lord, and righteousness from the God of his salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | This is the generation of those whose hearts are turned to you, even to your face, O God of Jacob. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Let your heads be lifted up, O doors; be lifted up, O you eternal doors: that the King of glory may come in. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Who is the King of glory? The Lord of strength and power, the Lord strong in war. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Let your heads be lifted up, O doors; let them be lifted up, O you eternal doors: that the King of glory may come in. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Who is the King of glory? The Lord of armies, he is the King of glory. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
